signup.success:
Welcome to FleetYards.net! Your account has been created.
You will receive a confirmation email to activate your account.
signup.invalid: Please resolve the errors before your account can be created.
signup.failure: We could not create your account. Please try again later.

accountConfirm.success:
Your account was successfully confirmed.
You can now login.
accountConfirm.failure: Your account could not be confirmed.

requestPasswordChange.success: If your email address exists in our database, you will receive a password recovery link at your email address in a few minutes.

changePassword.failure: Your password could not be updated.

oauthApplications.secretWarning: Copy your client secret now. You won't be able to see it again.

avatarUpload.invalidExtension: The Picture you provided has an invalid Format. Supported Formats are: %{extensions}.

hangarImport.invalidExtension: The Import you provided has an invalid Format. Supported Formats are: %{extensions}.

hangarExport.failure: Export failed, Please try again later.

success.noHtml: Your new %{model} will be delivered to your Hangar
Your new %{model} was added to your Wishlist

moveToWishlist.success: Moved all Ingame bought Ships to your Wishlist.
moveToWishlist.failure: Could not move all Ingame bought Ships to your Wishlist.

removeAll.success: Removed all Ingame bought Ships from your Hangar.
removeAll.failure: Could not remove all Ingame bought Ships from your Hangar.

model.syncStarted: Model sync started. You will be notified when it completes.
model.syncMatrixStarted: Model matrix sync started. You will be notified when it completes.
model.syncScDataStarted: Model SC data sync started. You will be notified when it completes.

backupCodes.failure: Backup Codes could not be generated.

accountRequired.noHtml: You need to Sign up or Login to add Ships to your Hangar.
accountRequired.paragraph2: to add Ships to your Hangar.

error.default:
Something wrong happened.
Have you tried turning it off and on again?

destroy.success:
Your Account has been destroyed.
Sad to see you go :'(
destroy.failure: We could not destroy your Account! Please try again later.
We could not destroy your Fleet.

create.failure: Could not add item to inventory.

withdrawal.failure: Could not record withdrawal. Check available stock.

destroy.confirm: This will permanently delete the mission and all its teams, ships, and slots. This action cannot be undone.

archive.confirm: Archive this event? Members will no longer see it in the upcoming list.

syncToDiscord.failure: Could not push event to Discord.

destroy.confirm: This will permanently delete the event. This action cannot be undone.

publish.success: Event published — sign-ups are now open.

cancel.confirm: Cancel this event? Participants will be notified.

destroy.confirm: Remove this team and all its ships and slots?
Remove this ship and its slots?

Join request for %{fleet} send!
Once your Membership is accepted you will be notified via email

vehicle.destroy: Are you sure you want to remove this Ship from you Hangar?

hangar.import:
Imported ships will be added to your Hangar without matching to exisiting Ships.

Supported Formats are: Fleetyards Export or HangarXplor.

Do you want to continue?
